title: Vapi Healthcare Scheduler — Amy at VAPI Health Clinic
description: AI voice receptionist for a medical clinic that books, reschedules, and cancels appointments via cal.com, enforces 9–5 business hours, and routes urgent callers to human staff. Ported verbatim from Vapi's official example assistant.

tools.name: checkCalendarVAPIHealth
tools.description: Check available appointment slots in cal.com

tools.name: bookCalendarVAPIHealth
tools.description: Create a new appointment for the caller

tools.name: getCalendarVAPIHealth
tools.description: Retrieve an existing appointment by name/phone

tools.name: rescheduleCalendarVAPIHealth
tools.description: Move an appointment to a new time

tools.name: transfer_call
tools.description: Warm transfer to nursing, billing, reception, or admin

tools.name: end_call
tools.description: Politely terminate the call on guardrail trigger

notes: ElevenLabs voice model in the source file is literally 'eleven_flash_v2' with voiceId 'sarah'; normalized to allowed-list 'ElevenLabs Flash v2.5'. Source uses LiveKit smart endpointing waitFunction '20 + 500 * sqrt(x) + 2500 * x^3'; maxTokens=225 in source.
